info.name: E-Commerce API Testing
info.description:
Complete REST API test collection for E-Commerce Web Application.
Covers: Auth, Products, Cart, Orders, Payment, Users.
Prepared by: QA Engineer | Tool: Postman

exec: pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Token in response', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('token'); pm.collectionVariables.set('auth_token', json.token); });
pm.test('Response time < 500ms', () => pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(500));
pm.test('Status is 401', () => pm.response.to.have.status(401));
pm.test('Error message present', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.message).to.include('Invalid'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Session cleared', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.message).to.include('logged out'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Response is array', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.products).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('Products have required fields', () => { const p = pm.response.json().products[0]; pm.expect(p).to.have.all.keys('id','name','price','stock'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Product ID matches', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.id).to.eql('prod_001'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Results contain search term', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); json.results.forEach(r => pm.expect(r.name.toLowerCase()).to.include('shoe')); });
pm.test('Status is 201', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
pm.test('Cart item created', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('cart_item_id'); pm.collectionVariables.set('cart_item_id', json.cart_item_id); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Cart has items', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.items).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; });
pm.test('Total price is number', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.total).to.be.a('number'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Quantity updated', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.quantity).to.eql(3); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Item deleted confirmation', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.deleted).to.eql(true); });
pm.test('Status is 201', () => pm.response.to.have.status(201));
pm.test('Order ID returned', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('order_id'); pm.collectionVariables.set('order_id', json.order_id); });
pm.test('Order status is pending', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('pending'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Order has required fields', () => { const o = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(o).to.have.all.keys('order_id','status','items','total','shipping_address'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Payment URL returned', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('payment_url'); pm.expect(json.payment_url).to.include('https://'); });
pm.test('Status is 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Payment verified', () => { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.verified).to.eql(true); pm.expect(json.status).to.eql('success'); });
